testcase.name: reactivateUser_forbidden
testcase.failure:
org.mockito.exceptions.verification.NeverWantedButInvoked: userService.reactivateUser(<any>, <any>); Never wanted here: -> at com.user_service.controller.UserControllerTest.reactivateUser_forbidden(UserControllerTest.java:203) But invoked here: -> at com.user_service.controller.UserController.reactivateUser(UserController.java:113) with arguments: [STU_101, ADMIN_001]
at com.user_service.controller.UserControllerTest.reactivateUser_forbidden(UserControllerTest.java:203) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: getUsers_unauthorized
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Status expected:<401> but was:<403> at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.fail(AssertionErrors.java:61) at org.springframework.test.util.AssertionErrors.assertEquals(AssertionErrors.java:128) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.result.StatusResultMatchers.lambda$matcher$9(StatusResultMatchers.java:640) at org.springframework.test.web.servlet.MockMvc$1.andExpect(MockMvc.java:214) at com.user_service.controller.UserControllerTest.getUsers_unauthorized(UserControllerTest.java:134) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: deactivateUser_success
testcase.error: org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called at com.user_service.controller.UserControllerTest.deactivateUser_success(UserControllerTest.java:146) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: createUser_forbidden
testcase.error: org.mockito.exceptions.base.MockitoException: Only void methods can doNothing()! Example of correct use of doNothing(): doNothing(). doThrow(new RuntimeException()) .when(mock).someVoidMethod(); Above means: someVoidMethod() does nothing the 1st time but throws an exception the 2nd time is called at com.user_service.controller.UserControllerTest.createUser_forbidden(UserControllerTest.java:113) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: getUsers_success
